title: FeelIT Demo Workspace
description: Curated launcher workspace that combines demo models, bundled documents, bundled audio, and a controlled file-browser root for internal demonstrations.

models.title: Walt Head
models.summary: Contour-rich sculpture for introductory tactile exploration.

models.title: Terrain Peak
models.summary: Topographic relief sample for slope and landscape interpretation.

models.title: Open Book
models.summary: Reading-adjacent object for page, spine, and surface transitions.

texts.title: Alice in Wonderland
texts.summary: Narrative reading sample with segmented tactile access.

texts.title: Pride and Prejudice
texts.summary: Long-form prose sample for multi-segment reading sessions.

texts.title: The Raven
texts.summary: Short HTML poem sample for quick tactile reading flows.

audio.title: Alice Chapter One
audio.summary: Companion narration from the bundled internal library.

audio.title: The Raven Audio
audio.summary: Short-form spoken-poetry sample for audio-scene controls.
